Companies & Collaborations
Project Legends
Project Legends
Co-founder & Producer · 2022 – 2024

Co-founded the studio behind Soccer Legends, a mobile soccer RPG with gacha mechanics. Led fundraising, cross-functional team coordination, and production from concept to launch.

GameBCN
GameBCN
Startup Mentor · 2023 – 2024

Served as startup mentor in Riyadh for the Saudi Game Champions program, coaching early-stage game studios through production pipelines, game design fundamentals, and team development.

Symmetric Studio
Symmetric Studio
Lead Designer · 2025

Co-defined studio strategy & operating model (game genre, design pillars, studio structure) and built core loop, progression and economy models for Valley Of Fog.

Silver Thumb Games
Silver Thumb Games
Mentor · 2024 - 2025

Provided expert advice on design, programming and leadership. Set studio foundations and strategy.

CODE - Saudi Game Champions 1/2
CODE - Saudi Game Champions 1/2
Project Manager and MC · 2024-2025

Built the Saudi Game Champions program (training scheduling, team evaluation, guest invitations) and provided more than 30 trainings on Game Design, Production, Leadership and Programming. Moderated more than 10 events with international guests of the gaming industry.

ENTI - UB
ENTI - UB
Speaker · 2023-2025

Gave talks about entrepreneurship, game desing and leadership as an alumni of the school.

About

A bridge builder
in game development

I'm a game developer and producer based near Barcelona, with a background that spans production, design, programming, and team communication. I work best at the intersection of disciplines — translating vision into execution.

I co-founded Project Legends, the studio behind Soccer Legends, a mobile soccer RPG with gacha mechanics, where I led fundraising and cross-functional team coordination from the ground up.

More recently I served as a startup mentor in Riyadh for the Saudi Game Champions program (GameBCN), coaching early-stage game studios through production pipelines, game design fundamentals, and team development — from first prototype to launch.

My core strength is bridging communication across developer, artist, and designer teams — making sure nothing falls through the cracks and that creative ambition stays grounded in reality.

1.5+
Years mentoring startups internationally
3
Core disciplines: production, design, programming
∞
Passion for games — from Pokémon to indie gems
BCN
Based near Barcelona, working globally
Services

How I can
help you

🎮

Producer

End-to-end production management for game projects. I keep timelines, teams, and creative vision aligned.

  • Project planning & roadmapping
  • Cross-team communication & coordination
  • Milestone tracking & risk management
  • Pitch decks & stakeholder reporting
✏️

Game Designer

Systems, mechanics, and player experience design. From core loops to full GDD documentation.

  • Core loop & mechanic design
  • Monetisation strategy (gacha, IAP)
  • Game Design Documents (GDD)
  • Playtesting & iteration
💻

Programmer

Hands-on development support. Prototyping, tooling, and technical guidance for game teams.

  • Prototype development
  • Tool & pipeline scripting
  • Technical documentation
  • Code reviews & architecture advice
🚀

Mentorship

Tailored mentorship for indie studios and developers navigating early-stage game production.

  • 1-on-1 or team sessions
  • Early-stage studio guidance
  • Career path coaching
  • International game industry perspective

work

Prototype Blender Low-poly

Robo Project

Blog

Thoughts &
dispatches

Originally published on LinkedIn — readable here.

May 2025 2 min read

Game of the Week - Dragon Quest Smash/Grow

When you adapt a genre, the first question isn't 'what can I add?'. It's 'why does this work?'. The auto-battler formula works because it removes decisions. Adding goes against it.

gotwdesign
Read more →
May 2025 2 min read

How to make investors drop their phones

In a world where nobody really cares about you or your projects. You must put on a show and become a performer. Here's how.

pitchinvestors
Read more →
May 2025 2 min read

I started tracking too late

We had the game, we had the money, we had the people. And we forgot about the single most important thing. Costing us EVERYTHING.

analyticsproduction

Let's work
together.

Whether you need a producer to steer your project, an audit of your team's process, or a mentorship partner — I'm open to conversations.
